title: A Boat Comes In
content:
Although I shall not see his face
    For the low riding of the ship,
    The three armorial oak-leaves on his cloak
    Will be enough.
    But what if I make a mistake
    And call to the wrong man?
    Or make no sign at all,
    And it is he?

    Japanese Street Song.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "A Boat Comes In", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
